case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. vs. BURGAR, CAROL L.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BURGAR, CAROL L.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURGAR, CAROL L. $2,749.82 PRINCIPAL, $2,648.14 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,420.96 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BURGAR, CAROL L.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BURGAR, CAROL L. OEX HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610

APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BURGAR, CAROL L. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURGAR, CAROL L. $10,789.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,789.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
